tool.name: request_auth_handoff
tool.description:
Pause agent and request operator to manually authenticate in the sandbox browser.
When the agent hits a login form it can't automate (2FA, SSO, CAPTCHA, WebAuthn, magic link), call this tool. A modal pops up in the panel showing a live browser view; operator types their credentials directly in the browser; Caido proxy captures the resulting session token; agent resumes with authenticated context.
Credentials NEVER flow through the LLM — the agent only sees that auth succeeded and fetches the session token from proxy history after unblock.
Typical flow: 1. request_auth_handoff(url="https://target.com/login", reason="Testing horizontal IDOR requires authenticated session") 2. (blocks for up to 10 min waiting for operator) 3. On success, call search_burp_proxy_history(host="target.com", status_min=200, status_max=299) to find the auth response 4. Call record_credential(source="browser_handoff", token="", token_type="...", validated=true) 5. Proceed with authenticated testing

parameter.name: url
parameter.description: The login URL the operator should navigate to (or already be at).

parameter.name: reason
parameter.description: Why you need auth — shown to operator so they understand the context.

parameter.name: expected_session_type
parameter.description: http_cookie / bearer / jwt / oauth — helps panel UI show proper extraction hints.

parameter.name: timeout_seconds
parameter.description: How long to wait for operator. Default 600 (10 min).

parameter.name: poll_interval
parameter.description: How often to check for completion. Default 2.0s.

tool.name: list_pending_handoffs
tool.description: List all currently pending handoff requests. Used by panel UI.
